title: 15 Months Data Analyst #EAT
description:
Key Responsibilities:

  • Support Deployment Principal to communicate, onboard, and support suppliers in execution of Product Traceability Compliance programs using Deployment principal approved messaging
  • Develop and optimize APIs and SQL queries for efficient data extraction on a biweekly basis
  • Create and maintain interactive dashboards using Excel and Tableau / Power BI
  • Implement and manage data ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes
  • Collaborate with platform vendors to ensure data accuracy and accessibility
  • Develop reports to present insights and recommendations to stakeholders
  • Develop and maintain communication calendar and deployment timeline
  • Meeting scheduling, notes, and recaps
  • Document and maintain program FAQs and responses
  • Develop, deploy, and analyze supplier survey on program feedback
  • Perform validations in product traceability
  • Required Skills:
  • Advanced proficiency in Excel and Tableau / Power BI dashboard development
  • Working knowledge of SQL and database management
  • Experience with Microsoft Power Automated for workflow automation
  • Experience with API integration
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities
  • Excellent communication skills and relationship management for stakeholder collaboration

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in business Analytics, Computer Science, or related field
  • 2+ years of experience in data analysis and visualization
  • Demonstrated experience in ETL processes and dashboard maintenance and vendor management

For interested candidates, please send your updated resume:

Email: angelateh@recruitexpress.com.sg

Telegram: @Angie_TL

Whatsapp: +65 96272860

Angela Teh Ling Wei

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
